calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-03-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:59am
Judge Pro Tem Nancy Newman, nothing on record, clerk-beth Wilber, Dept. 525:
Appellant, James P. Quinn, in Pro Per is not present. Deborah Anderson appears on his behalf. Respondent, Allen Schneider, appears in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative. Appellant's (Deborah Anderson) oral motion to continue the hearing is denied.
EXHR not numbered. (Respondent submitted entire small claims envelope of exhibits)
11:07am
Matter is submitted. Respondent's exhibit is retained. Respondent informs the Court his address has changed and IJS will be updated.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Judgment Entered
